head.hi: The Mexican Ambassador to the Secretary of State.

div.p: This embassy has private information to the effect that the I. C. Hirsch Iron, Steel & Rail Co., of Cincinnati, Ohio, whose address is International Building, 226 East Fourth Street, holds a stock of 15,000 Springfield rifles and 125,000 cartridges and is ready to sell the rifles for $1.85, without, bayonet, or $2.09, with bayonet and belt, and the cartridges for $24.15 a thousand, or $21.40 for the whole lot. The factory announces that it has received offers for the purchase of those arms.
